dev-control

Developer toolkit for repository automation

  • 🌳
    Interactive Git Tree
    Animated fractal visualisation of the commit history
  • 🖼️
    Git Tree SVG
    Static vector image of the repository tree
  • 📊
    Tree Data (JSON)
    Raw commit, branch, and tag data
  • 📐
    Layout Positions (JSON)
    Calculated fractal tree node positions
XAOSTECH/dev-control
